hero.title: Post-Sale Service with Defined Accountability.
hero.description:
PEIC coordinates lifecycle service support for PEIC-manufactured systems and supported partner-brand equipment.
AMC/CMC contracts, spare parts coordination, site diagnosis, refurbishment, service escalation, and technical response are handled through one PEIC relationship wherever applicable.

offerings_heading.label: PEIC Service Advantages
offerings_heading.title: Support coverage built to reduce downtime.

process.title: Log the Request
process.description: Contact PEIC by phone, email, or service enquiry. Urgent service calls are prioritised by phone, and email/service enquiries are reviewed within 1 business day.

process.title: Triage & Dispatch Planning
process.description: PEIC reviews the equipment type, fault details, site location, urgency, and parts availability before planning the next service action.

process.title: On-Site Technical Response
process.description: PEIC service engineers or authorised partner engineers are coordinated based on equipment type and location. If needed, the manufacturing engineering team is brought in as well.

process.title: Resolution & Service Record
process.description: PEIC provides a service record covering findings, actions taken, parts used, and recommended next steps. Where possible, corrective action is completed during the visit.

offerings.title: AMC / CMC Contract Tiers
offerings.description: Structured AMC and CMC options covering preventive maintenance, service callouts, parts replacement, inspection, and calibration where applicable.

offerings.title: Spare Parts Inventory
offerings.description: Critical components supported locally for PEIC-manufactured systems, with authorised sourcing channels and/or stocked inventory for partner-brands.

offerings.title: Response, Diagnosis & Solution Outline
offerings.description: Each service request is triaged by urgency, location, equipment type, and parts requirement, then followed with a documented service path.

offerings.title: Equipment Refurbishing & Upgrades
offerings.description: Lifecycle extension for suitable ageing equipment, including mechanical overhaul, control upgrades, refinishing, testing, and re-commissioning.

custom_cta.label: Service Planning
custom_cta.title: Planning service coverage for a healthcare facility?
custom_cta.description: PEIC can structure coordinated AMC/CMC support for manufactured and supported partner-brand equipment under one service relationship.
